transcript.content: T-356 seems like it may be a warning or repair-plan case, though the file is mixed. Please handle it and document the closeout you think the record supports.

{'customer': 'Holly Nguyen', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Holly Nguyen / vendor lunch threshold', 'body': 'Holly accepted a vendor lunch $12 over the gift threshold during a site visit. She disclosed it on the same day and offered reimbursement.'}

The record actually supports a lighter closeout than a formal warning: same-day self-disclosure, small overage ($12), and proactive reimbursement offer. That's a coaching/documented-reminder outcome, with reimbursement accepted.

args.body: Vendor lunch exceeded gift threshold by $12 during site visit. Mitigating factors: same-day self-disclosure and unsolicited offer to reimburse the overage. No pattern on file. Outcome: documented reminder of gift/hospitality threshold and acceptance of $12 reimbursement to neutralize the excess. No formal warning or repair plan warranted given de minimis amount and good-faith disclosure. Manager to reinforce pre-acceptance check for borderline hospitality going forward.
